nodes.label: Three-panel figure: (A) amount sent in Dictator Game, (B) proposal in Ultimatum Game, (C) min acceptable payment in Ultimatum Game — all by inequality of outcomes and opportunity, essentially flat across conditions (~35, ~57, ~33 respectively)

hyperedges.label: Behavioral game-outcome measures (max/min acceptable UG payment, DG/UG proposal amounts) that together characterize bargaining behavior across inequality conditions
